name: tokis-ui-monorepo
description: Tokis (Tokis Only Knows Its Styles) — Performance-first, token-native UI design system monorepo

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/tokens && npm run build --workspace=packages/core && npm run build --workspace=packages/react && npm run build --workspace=packages/icons
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/tokens && npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/core && npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/react && npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/icons
scripts.clean: rm -rf packages/tokens/dist packages/core/dist packages/react/dist packages/icons/dist .npm-cache coverage
scripts.pack:dry-run: npm --cache .npm-cache pack --dry-run --workspace=packages/tokens && npm --cache .npm-cache pack --dry-run --workspace=packages/core && npm --cache .npm-cache pack --dry-run --workspace=packages/theme && npm --cache .npm-cache pack --dry-run --workspace=packages/react && npm --cache .npm-cache pack --dry-run --workspace=packages/icons && npm --cache .npm-cache pack --dry-run --workspace=packages/tokis
scripts.release:check: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run pack:dry-run
scripts.publish:all: npm run version:set && npm run release:check && npm run publish:tokens && npm run publish:core && npm run publish:theme && npm run publish:react && npm run publish:icons && npm run publish:tokis
